product: Use Universal Commits to purchase Marketplace partner products ​
tagline: June 15, 2026 You can now use up to 10% of your Universal Commits to purchase eligible third party partner products through Databricks Marketplace.
what_it_does: June 15, 2026 You can now use up to 10% of your Universal Commits to purchase eligible third party partner products through Databricks Marketplace. See [Databricks Marketplace Universal Commit Drawdown program](/aws/en/marketplace/ drawdown program).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 15, 2026 You
